UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALLIDAY, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 330 CLEMENTINA, #1209, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
